sections.heading: Amazon Web Services (AWS)
sections.body:
To learn more about the [Amazon Web Services (AWS)](amazon-aws),
[cluster configuration options](amazon-aws-configuration-options), [availability zones](amazon-aws-availability-zones), and [integrations](aws-integrations) that Atlas supports on AWS (Amazon Web Services), see
[Amazon Web Services (AWS)](amazon-aws).

sections.heading: Google Cloud Platform (GCP)
sections.body:
To learn more about the [Google Cloud Platform (GCP)](google-gcp),
[cluster configuration options](google-gcp-configuration-options), [GCP zones](google-gcp-availability-zones), and [integrations](gcp-integrations) that Atlas supports on Google Cloud, see
[Google Cloud Platform (GCP)](google-gcp).

sections.heading: Microsoft Azure
sections.body:
To learn more about the [Microsoft Azure](microsoft-azure),
[cluster configuration options](microsoft-azure-configuration-options), [availability zones](microsoft-azure-availability-zones), [fault domains](microsoft-azure-fault-domains), and [integrations](azure-integrations) that Atlas supports on Azure (Microsoft Azure), see
[Microsoft Azure](microsoft-azure).
